projects.headline: Prime
projects.summary: Full creative production for Prime's entry into the hydration market. TV-ready spots, social cutdowns, and influencer content that matched the brand's energy and Gen-Z audience.
projects.challenge: Prime needed to break into a crowded hydration market dominated by legacy brands. They required content that could cut through the noise and resonate with a young, social-first audience. The brand had strong momentum from celebrity founders, but lacked a cohesive visual system that could scale across broadcast, digital, and influencer channels. Every asset had to feel native to each platform while maintaining a consistent brand voice.
projects.solution: We delivered a full creative suite: hero TV spots, platform-specific social cutdowns, and influencer-ready content. Every asset was optimized for virality while staying true to the brand's bold, energetic identity. We built a flexible content system that allowed rapid adaptation—from 6-second TikTok hooks to 30-second TV spots—without losing quality or brand consistency. The creative direction emphasized movement, contrast, and the product's distinctive look to ensure instant recognition.
projects.results: The campaign drove over 2 million impressions in the first month. Spots were adapted across 8 platforms with strong engagement. Prime established a distinct visual identity in the category. The content system we built continues to support new product launches and seasonal campaigns with minimal additional production. Brand recall and consideration metrics exceeded benchmarks, and the creative became a template for future campaigns.
projects.outcome: Campaign drove 2M+ impressions in first month. Spots adapted across 8 platforms.

projects.headline: Boat
projects.summary: Audio brand storytelling that puts product and lifestyle front and center. Hero spots and social-first content that resonates with India's youth.
projects.challenge: Boat needed to stand out in India's competitive audio market. Their products were strong, but they lacked a cohesive visual language that could scale across retail, digital, and influencer channels. The brand was building trust with a young, price-sensitive audience that relied heavily on social proof and authentic storytelling. We had to create content that felt native to Indian culture and aspirations without appearing generic or imported.
projects.solution: We created hero spots and social-first content that blended product showcase with lifestyle moments. From unboxing to real-world use, every piece told an authentic story that resonated with India's youth. We focused on real environments—college campuses, commutes, late-night sessions—where the product would actually be used. The visual language emphasized clarity, color, and energy to cut through cluttered feeds while maintaining premium positioning.
projects.results: Assets scaled seamlessly across retail displays, digital campaigns, and influencer partnerships. The brand established a recognizable visual identity that drove consideration and conversion. Content performance exceeded category benchmarks, and the system we built allowed regional teams to deploy localized versions without losing brand cohesion. Boat's visual identity became a key differentiator in a market where many competitors still relied on product-only imagery.
projects.outcome: Assets scaled across retail, digital, and influencer partnerships.

projects.headline: Nike
projects.summary: Commercial production aligned with Nike's performance and culture pillars. Polished spots that fit global brand guidelines while pushing creative boundaries for regional campaigns.
projects.challenge: Nike's regional teams needed high-quality commercial content that could meet global brand standards while delivering locally relevant creative for APAC markets. The brand's guidelines are exacting—typography, color, motion, and tone must align with a global system—yet each market has unique cultural nuances and competitive dynamics. Regional teams needed a partner who could navigate both worlds without compromise.
projects.solution: We delivered polished spots that aligned with Nike's performance and culture pillars. Every frame met brand guidelines while pushing creative boundaries appropriate for regional campaigns. We invested upfront in understanding the global toolkit and local briefs, then built a production process that could iterate quickly without sacrificing quality. The result was content that felt unmistakably Nike while resonating with APAC audiences.
projects.results: Content integrated into regional campaigns across APAC. Consistent quality at scale enabled local teams to deploy with confidence. Strong performance against brand KPIs. The partnership established a repeatable workflow for future regional launches, reducing turnaround time and ensuring consistency across markets. Nike's APAC teams continue to use the creative framework we developed.
projects.outcome: Integrated into regional campaigns across APAC. Consistent quality at scale.

projects.headline: Bliss
projects.summary: End-to-end production for Bliss's brand refresh. Premium visual identity—product hero shots, testimonial content, and lifestyle vignettes for D2C and retail.
projects.challenge: Bliss needed a complete brand refresh to compete in the premium wellness space. They required a cohesive visual identity that could work across D2C, retail, and social. The brand was evolving from a single-product focus to a broader wellness positioning, and the existing assets felt dated and inconsistent. Retail partners and D2C audiences both needed to see a clear, premium story that justified the price point and built trust.
projects.solution: From concept to final cut, we shaped a premium visual identity. Product hero shots, testimonial content, and lifestyle vignettes were designed to perform across every channel. We established a light, color, and composition system that could flex from e-commerce to editorial-style social content. Every asset was crafted to feel aspirational yet achievable—premium without being inaccessible. The system included guidelines for future content so the brand could scale without constant agency support.
projects.results: A full asset library was delivered. Content is performing 40% above category benchmarks. The refreshed identity has become a key differentiator in their market. Bliss saw improved conversion on D2C, stronger sell-through at retail, and higher engagement on social. The asset library reduced production costs for subsequent campaigns while maintaining quality and consistency.
projects.outcome: Full asset library delivered. Content performing 40% above benchmarks.

projects.headline: Trimmer
projects.summary: Commercial production for a grooming brand. Clean, product-focused spots that highlight features and build trust.
projects.challenge: Trimmer needed to communicate product quality and features in a crowded grooming market without feeling generic or dated. The category was saturated with similar messaging, and consumers were skeptical of marketing claims. We had to create content that demonstrated real value and build trust through clarity and premium execution.
projects.solution: We created clean, product-focused spots that highlighted key features while maintaining a modern, premium aesthetic. Every frame built trust through clarity and polish. We used macro shots and clean cuts to showcase build quality and performance, avoiding the flashy effects that made competitors feel gimmicky. The pacing and music supported a confident, no-nonsense tone.
projects.results: The campaign performed strongly in performance channels. Product clarity drove consideration, and the premium feel elevated the brand in the category. View-through and engagement rates exceeded benchmarks, and the creative became the go-to asset for both paid and organic distribution. The brand saw improved conversion on product pages where the video was featured.
projects.outcome: Product clarity drove consideration across digital channels.

projects.headline: Maluma Vape
projects.summary: Celebrity-aligned commercial production. Bold visuals that connect product to lifestyle and culture.
projects.challenge: Maluma Vape needed to leverage their celebrity connection while building a distinct brand identity that could extend beyond a single partnership. Relying too heavily on the star could limit longevity; ignoring the connection would waste a major asset. We needed to balance both.
projects.solution: We produced bold, lifestyle-forward spots that connected the product to culture and aspiration. The visuals were designed to feel authentic and shareable across social channels. We framed the celebrity presence as part of a broader lifestyle story rather than a standalone endorsement, ensuring the brand could stand on its own for future campaigns.
projects.results: Strong engagement across social platforms. The campaign established a visual language that could scale for future product launches. Share rates and comment sentiment were particularly strong, and the creative was widely reposted by fans. The brand team has since used the visual system for non-celebrity campaigns with consistent results.
projects.outcome: Strong engagement and scalable visual language established.

projects.headline: Chris Bar Vape
projects.summary: Vape brand commercial production. Premium positioning through refined visuals and storytelling.
projects.challenge: Chris Bar needed to differentiate in a competitive category through premium positioning and visual refinement. The vape space was crowded with brands competing on price and flavor variety. Standing out required a clear point of view and execution that signaled quality.
projects.solution: We delivered refined spots that elevated the product through careful framing, lighting, and pacing. The result was a premium feel that stood out in the category. We avoided the neon and nightlife tropes common in the space, instead opting for clean, considered visuals that felt more like a luxury product launch than a vape ad.
projects.results: The campaign helped establish Chris Bar as a premium option. Content performed well in targeted channels. Retail partners reported that the creative helped justify shelf placement and pricing. The brand has continued to use the premium visual language for subsequent launches.

projects.headline: Super Human
projects.summary: Supplement brand commercial production. Performance-focused creative across product lines.
projects.challenge: Super Human had multiple product lines and needed cohesive creative that could work for each while building overall brand authority. Each product had distinct benefits and audiences, but the brand needed to feel unified. Fragmented creative would dilute the brand; overly uniform content would fail to resonate with each segment.
projects.solution: We produced spots for their Black and Orange lines that shared a consistent visual language while allowing each product to shine. Performance and results were central to the messaging. We established a color and motion system that could flex across products, with each spot feeling like part of a family rather than a one-off.
projects.results: Both campaigns drove strong engagement. The consistent visual system made future launches faster and more cost-effective. The brand reported improved cross-sell between product lines, and the creative framework has been used for two additional product launches since.
projects.outcome: Cohesive creative across product lines. Strong engagement.

projects.headline: Insane Labz
projects.summary: Fitness supplement commercial production. High-energy creative that matches the brand's intensity.
projects.challenge: Insane Labz needed creative that could match their brand's intensity and resonate with a serious fitness audience. The supplement space is noisy, and the target audience is skeptical of marketing. We had to create content that felt authentic to the community and the brand's bold personality.
projects.solution: We produced high-energy spots that captured the brand's personality. The visuals were bold and unapologetic, designed to cut through in a crowded supplement space. We leaned into the intensity rather than softening it—the result was content that felt native to gym culture and the brand's existing community.
projects.results: The campaign resonated strongly with the target audience. Engagement metrics exceeded benchmarks. The brand reported strong performance in affiliate and influencer channels, where the creative was frequently repurposed. Community sentiment was positive, with fans sharing and commenting on the spots organically.
projects.outcome: Strong resonance with fitness audience. Exceeded engagement benchmarks.

projects.headline: Karma and Luck
projects.summary: Lifestyle brand commercial production. Authentic storytelling that connects product to identity.
projects.challenge: Karma and Luck needed to build a brand story that felt authentic and connected to their audience's identity. The wellness and lifestyle space is full of brands that feel manufactured. Standing out required genuine connection and visuals that audiences could see themselves in.
projects.solution: We created spots that blended product with lifestyle in an authentic way. The visuals told a story that audiences could see themselves in. We avoided the overly polished look common in the category, instead opting for warm, relatable settings and natural lighting that felt more like a friend's recommendation than an ad.
projects.results: Strong performance in social and influencer channels. The brand established a clear identity in the space. UGC-style reposts and influencer adoption were high, and the brand reported that the creative resonated particularly well with their core demographic in surveys and feedback.
projects.outcome: Authentic identity established. Strong social performance.

projects.headline: Airpods
projects.summary: Audio product commercial production. Premium product storytelling for a tech leader.
projects.challenge: AirPods needed to communicate premium quality and seamless experience in a concise, scroll-stopping format. The product is iconic, but in a crowded audio market, even established brands need to continually reinforce differentiation. The creative had to work in short formats without feeling compressed.
projects.solution: We delivered spots that highlighted product design and user experience. Clean, premium visuals that matched the product's positioning. We focused on the details—fit, sound quality, ecosystem integration—that matter to the audience, using macro and lifestyle shots that felt both aspirational and relatable.
projects.results: Content performed strongly in digital channels. The premium feel reinforced brand perception. The spots were used across paid social, programmatic, and retail touchpoints. The brand team reported strong performance in consideration-focused campaigns.
projects.outcome: Premium product storytelling. Strong digital performance.
